# Agent Roles Manifest

## Structure

```yaml

project:
  name: "..."

  read_only: { ... }

    trigger: "..."
    responsibilities: [...]
    hard_rules: [...]
```

## Pipeline

```text
Scout -> Screener -> Claim Ledger -> Analyst -> Editor -> Auditor -> Formatter
```

## Pipeline Roles

- **scout** (pipeline)
- **screener** (pipeline)

- **analyst** (pipeline)
- **auditor** (pipeline)

## Coordination Roles
